riskFactors: CFG is a governance/utility token, not a direct claim on a specific real-world asset pool, fund share, reserve, or redemption asset.
No public legal opinion URL or securities registration mapping was found for CFG in this dataset version.
No on-chain proof-of-reserves oracle or reserve audit applies to CFG as a governance token.
Token market data is available from aggregators, but holder concentration and on-chain liquidity depth are not yet fully mapped.
Official docs describe a V3 migration and governance transition; legacy seed data still referenced a deprecated contract address.
mitigants: Centrifuge has official documentation, an official token summary, and public governance materials.
The V3 CFG Ethereum token contract is publicly visible on Etherscan and mapped from official documentation.
Protocol-level TVL is tracked by DeFiLlama and token market data is tracked by CoinGecko.
The conservative classification avoids treating CFG as an asset-backed RWA claim token.
